3337050.name: The Night Games Collection
3337050.description:
The Night Games Collection invites you to experience a series of short, mystery-filled games set during the dark hours of the night. Each game unravels the secrets behind seemingly ordinary tasks, from isolated hotels to quiet doner shops. Players will uncover dark truths and face eerie events as they navigate through environments where every choice shapes the story’s outcome. Step into the shadows of the night and discover what lies beneath the surface.

  • Engaging Stories: Each game offers multiple endings shaped by your decisions.

  • Tension and Mystery: Uncover strange events hidden behind ordinary night shifts.

  • Short and Intense: Perfect for quick, thrilling experiences.

  • Multiple Endings: Encourages replayability with distinct story paths.

This collection is perfect for players who enjoy suspenseful night-time adventures.

Games Included:

  • Night Reception: Start your shift at a remote hotel, only to experience unsettling events as the night progresses. (15-20 minutes)

  • Night Doner: What seems like a quiet night at a döner shop soon turns into a night of bizarre happenings. (20-25 minutes)

  • Night Kebap: Takes you to a quiet kebab truck during a routine night shift. What starts as a normal job quickly spirals into a night filled with strange customers, unsettling events, and dark secrets. (30-40 minutes)

More games will be added to the collection over time, expanding the thrilling experiences with new, mysterious adventures.
3337050.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
